titleStmt.title: SII 40.289: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 289. (A.R. No. B. 334 of 1933.) Śiripuram, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up before the temple of Rāmaliṅgēśvara.

Records the gift of 100 puṭṭi of land for burning a perpetual lamp and conducting worship of the god Rāmēśvaradēva of Siripuram in Koṇḍapaḍumaṭa (consisting of 12 villages) by the king, son of Goṅka. Further it records the gift of some lands to the several gods viz., Bhīmēśvara, Gō(Kō)ṭīśvara, Vishṇudēva and Gaṇēśvara for conducting services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti calama¨rttigaṇḍa paranṛpa
jivāpahāraṇakarayamadaṁḍaḥ
sadguṇaratakaraṁḍaḥ kavijanaśi
ṣṭēṣṭavanajavanamā¨rttaṇḍaḥ . mēnakṣitī
śvaravarēṇa maniṣivā¨rtthiḥ puṇyānika
tnakalitātula jīvanāni saśva¨rddhivriddhi ma
hitāni ciraṁttarāni datte samujjvala ye
śōlavitōttamāni . Esyasphuranniśita bhīṣa
ṇa khaḍgadhāra saṁpūjitā vijaya kanyaka
yādibātiniccannavairi gajamastaka pīṭha
jāta muktākṣatōjvala karāṁbujayāraṇa
nai . sōyaṁ śrī vēlanāṁṭi goṁkka śrīpati trai
lōkya dīpāṁkkura ttivrādipraṇadāritāri nika
rassājanya ratnākaraḥ prōdyalāṭavarāṭa kuṁ
ttalapati ni¨rjjityabahāsinātatsa¨rvvasva
madājagannuta yaśaḥ kāminijasvāminē
sakalō¨rdvijanarakṣaṇakṣamudaśāśāgha
¨rnnaki¨rtti¨rlatā prakaṭuṇu bhaṁḍana bhīmu
du¨rjjayakula prākāru satyavratunsuka
vīṁdrā varabhūjamuṇu baḍigulā¨rjjanu vī
rarājēṁdra cōḍi kumāruṁbraṇutiṁ pareśu
bhaṭakaṁdirunnudāruṁbrabhṛṇu . Ilavela
nāṁṭi gōṁkka vasudēśu tanūbhavuṁḍaina cōḍa
bhūtalapati sōḍapaṭṭamulō daṁbunaṁgaṭṭi
bhūjābalaṁbunaṁggolaṇu jayiṁcciyaṁddu ri
pu kuṁjarubhīmaniṁ jaṁpi Āṁdhra bhūtala
mu padāṟuvēlu satatasthitinele surēṁdra
līlalanu . svasti samasta prasasti sahitaṁ
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kulōttuṁggacōḍa go
ṁkkayamahārājula prayātmajuṁḍaina rājē
ṁdra cōḍa kumāruṁḍu goṇḍa paḍumaṭaṁ
baṁḍraṇḍu vūṁḍa siripuraṁbuna rāmēśva
radēvaraku dīpanivēdyabhōgaṁnaku yūri Āgnē
yaṁbuna dakṣiṇamukhaṁbaina daṇḍagaṭṭaya
ma ceṟuvunu guḍiyuttaraṁbuna tāḍitōṁ
ṭyunūri tū¨rppudiśābhāgaṁbunaṁdu
nūṟumaṭlu bhūmiyu śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1087 nēṁṭi yuttarāyaṇa nimittaṁbuna
sthānapatiki sānulaku mānulaku naṭṭamaṁḍādi

gā nibandhakoṟaku sa¨rvvakāra parihāra
ṁbugāniccina dattidēvaraku nivēdya bhūmi
kha 5 bhīmēśvaradēvara kha 1 na 10 . gōṭīśva
radēvara kha 1 viṣṇudēvara kha 2 gaṇēśvaru
ni kha 2 prōlerusāni kha 1 sthānapati mē
ḍajiyya kha 3 mupperisāni nāca
sānina ga kha 4 kommasāni māra kha 3
mārāsānipaḍla kha 3 kāṭāsāniva
lya ka kha 3 Aytāsānibayya kha 3 Ā
tyāsāni kāṭaka kha 3 na naṟvāsānikēta
kha 3 mailāsāni māca kha 3 prōlāsā
ni cāma kha 3 cevvāsāni pā¨rvvati kha
3 pērāsāni Eṟapāpa kha 3 muttāsā
ni pōma kha 3 naṭṭamala vāmamāreni kha 6
mākari sūre kha 4 maddaliya Eṟna
kha 4 maddaliya dēvana kha 4 vāsikō
ṟa kha 3 mēlunāyaka māra
yarāju kha 3 saṁkkunaṁddi kha 2 do
raprole kha 1 na 10 goḍamanale kha 1 na
ṁ virikamrēka kha 2 ghaṁṭṭa Eṟna kha
1 mrugguveṭṭi timāsakamma kha 1
kāsya bhīmaprōlela kha 3 dēvara kavi
Eṟayaprākhya kha 3 vāsana bha
ṭṭa kha 3 dēvikavi gomme kha 3 Ilavela
nāṁṭṭi cōḍinrapu niccina dattamu dī
ni kanyadhādalaṁcina du¨rvvi nityaṁḍu ma
daṁbbaṟidu¨rddaśaṁjoṁṭṭivaṁṭṭiyākulu
ṁḍai kāluprōlu soraṁgoṭṭina viḍkaṟadā
na kaṁḍḍatānelakoni rauravāṁbudimu
niṁggiyaḍaṁggunanēkakālamulu . ce
ṟuvulu nūṟuvannasala ciṁtyamu satra
mulagrahāramulēkṛ ṟṛ kāni lakṣagaṁ
ggulakokoṭi śivālayamulu sahasra
kaṁpeṟuvadivēlu vāvulu satāddhara
mulu vadivelya brahmamuṁ jeṟicina A
ṁtta vā(pā)takamu siddamu dīniki hiṁsasē
sinanu . tanadattamanyadattaṁbanaṁ jana
du svadattameṭleṭla rakṣiṁpani taṁḍi
ṟuvadi vēlēṁḍlana varatama mēdyaki E
mai janiyiṁccuna . harahasēṁddu
tva pārasāradesitābhrarāmatōcca
kramaṁbara dugdhābdhi surāpagāṁbu rajata
Digital edition of SII 40.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
